reactions.startup_morning_1: Get up, the day is waiting! :D
reactions.startup_morning_2: Sun is shining (probably), time to learn.
reactions.startup_morning_3: Time to wake up that brain.
reactions.startup_night_3: Just don't stay up until morning...
reactions.first_time_1: Every expert was once a beginner.
reactions.return_0: Oh, you're back! I missed you.
reactions.return_1: You have been away for a while!
reactions.box_spam_0: why are you clicking him so much?

entry.title: Legal information
entry.subtitle: Check the privacy policy, licenses, and used materials separately.

hero.title: Privacy policy
hero.subtitle: This screen contains a short summary of privacy information. The full, official, and current version of the policy for the website and app is available online.

overview.title: Key points
overview.body: Memicard stores learning data primarily locally on the user's device. Data may leave the device only when the user uses a feature that requires it, such as export, sharing, e-mail contact, or optional Google Drive backup. The full, official, and current version of the privacy policy is available online.
bullets: the current version of the policy is available at https://memicard.com/privacy
the app does not require a user account for basic operation
the app does not use its own backend for ongoing user data handling

controller.title: Data controller and contact
controller.body: The controller of personal data processed in connection with the use of the Memicard website and mobile app is {{legalControllerName}}, creator of the Memicard app. Privacy contact: contact@memicard.com.
bullets: contact@memicard.com is used for privacy questions and support contact
if data remains only locally on the device, the controller may not have technical access to it unless the user sends it

localData.title: Local data
localData.body: The app stores data locally when needed for learning and selected app features.
bullets: learning progress, statistics, reviews, and helper data used by the learning mechanics
pinned courses, custom courses, custom flashcards, and settings related to editing them
app settings, interface preferences, and helper states saved by the app
if the user enters personal data into their own flashcards, courses, or descriptions, that data also remains stored locally on the device

exportSharingAndEmail.title: Export, sharing, and e-mail
exportSharingAndEmail.body: Data may leave the device when the user chooses a feature that sends it outside the app.
bullets: export and sharing may save or transfer data to a place selected by the user, such as a file manager, mail app, Google Drive, or another app from the system sharing sheet
the app may open a mail client to prepare a support message; sending the message is the user's decision
files and messages sent outside the app are then handled by the selected service, app, or e-mail provider

googleDrive.title: Google Drive backup
googleDrive.body: In the current state, the Google Drive backup feature is visible in the app, but connecting a Google account is temporarily inactive for the user. Until the user can enable it, the app does not save data backups to Google Drive.
bullets: after activation, the feature will work only after voluntary Google account authorization by the user
the backup may be stored in the app's private folder on Google Drive
the backup may contain flashcards, courses, settings, learning progress, and data needed to restore the app state

rights.title: User rights
rights.body: The user has rights under personal data protection laws, to the extent that they apply to the way the app is used. Details are described in the full online policy.
bullets: the right to access data, rectify it, delete it, receive a copy of the data, and data portability
the right to restrict processing and object to processing based on legitimate interest
the right to withdraw consent if processing is based on consent
the right to lodge a complaint with the President of the Personal Data Protection Office in Poland (PUODO)
rights.note: Privacy-related requests can be sent to contact@memicard.com. If data exists only locally on the user's device, some rights may be exercised directly by deleting data in the app or uninstalling the app.

hero.title: Licenses and used materials
hero.subtitle: This screen describes selected external materials and the rules for using them in the app. It is not part of the privacy policy.

materials.title: External materials
materials.body: Memicard may use selected external materials, such as images, illustrations, or other educational resources, according to their license terms or usage rules defined by the rights holders.
bullets: for materials requiring attribution, the app provides the source and basic information about the terms of use
some materials may be subject to additional restrictions, for example regarding the use of logos, trademarks, or presentation method
detailed terms for selected sources may be available through external links

skip.label: Skip
skip.title: Skip the tutorial?
skip.description: Are you sure you want to skip the tutorial?

languageIntro.title: Choose language
languageIntro.hintDefault: Choose a language to activate the button.

welcome.title: Welcome to Memicard :3
welcome.description:
Thank you for being here at this early stage of the app's development.

Memicard is still growing, so you may come across small bugs, unfinished areas, or features that still need improvement.

If something does not work, bothers you, or you have an idea for an improvement, please report it - it would help me a lot.

step1.title: Where am I?
step1.description: You are now on the screen where a course is activated.

step2.title: Why?
step2.description: The game will take flashcards from the active course.

step3.title: How to enable it?
step3.description: To activate a course, tap its tile.

step4.title: zzzzZZZZzzzz
step4.description: (waiting for you to activate a course)

step5.title: Course active
step5.description: Done, the course is active. You can start playing. Tap the Next button at the bottom right.

step1.title: What is this?
step1.description: This is the screen that appears once when starting each course.

step2.title: What matters?
step2.description: There are three more important options here that let you adjust the course to your needs.

step3.title: For starters
step3.description: For now, I recommend leaving them as they are.

step4.title: No worries
step4.description: You will still be able to change these settings later.

step5.title: What next?
step5.description: Tap Next if you want to go to the game.

step1.title: Here are flashcards
step1.description: This is the main learning screen. This is where all the magic happens.

step2.title: One moment
step2.description: First, I will show you around and explain what is what.

step3.title: Your flashcard
step3.description: Here you will see a question, word, image, or another task. If the answer is text-based, this is where you will type it.

step4.title: Action buttons
step4.description: Depending on the flashcard type, you will see different buttons here.

step5.title: Learning boxes
step5.description: These are boxes with flashcards — the most important part of the game.

step6.title: Rule one
step6.description: Every new flashcard first goes to box number one.

step7.title: Rule two
step7.description: The number under a box shows how many flashcards are currently inside it.

step9.title: Your turn
step9.description: Now type the answer and confirm it.
step9.descriptionKnowDontKnow: Now choose I KNOW or I DON'T KNOW.

step10.title: That went well
step10.description: Great, that is the correct answer!
step10.descriptionAssisted: Great, that is the correct answer! (This time there was a small hint :3)

step11.title: Up it goes
step11.description: As you can see, the flashcard has now moved to box number two.

step12.title: Correct answer
step12.description: Every time you answer correctly, the flashcard moves to the next box.

step13.title: When do you finish?
step13.description: For a flashcard to be considered learned, it has to pass through all 5 boxes.

step14.title: Final effect
step14.description: And when you answer correctly in box number six, you will see this effect.

step15.title: Small catch
step15.description: But be careful! When you answer incorrectly, the flashcard returns to box number one.

step16.title: Just a moment
step16.description: At the end, I will quickly show you the buttons around the game screen.

step17.title: Home screen
step17.description: This button takes you to the app's home screen.

step18.title: Change course
step18.description: Here you open the course panel and choose what you want to learn.

step19.title: Statistics
step19.description: Here you can check your learning progress and results.

step20.title: Dark mode
step20.description: Switch the app theme with one tap.

step21.description: This button opens the review screen and overdue flashcards.

step22.title: Back to the game
step22.description: This button takes you back to flashcards and the active course.

step23.title: Settings
step23.description: Here you can change the app appearance, learning options, and other settings.

step24.title: That's everything
step24.description: If something was unclear, you can find a guide in the main menu, and in settings you can restart the tutorial from the beginning.

actionsPositionNudge.title: Which button layout?
actionsPositionNudge.subtitle: You can change their position now, and later return to this in settings.

manualStep1.title: Oh, you found it!
manualStep1.description: This is a place for your own hints for the flashcard. You might be wondering why it is here.

autoStep1.title: This flashcard is pushing back
autoStep1.description: I can see this one flashcard is giving you trouble. Maybe a small hint will help a bit.

step2.title: What is it for?
step2.description: Sometimes a piece of information just refuses to stick. That is when it helps to add a small memory hook.

step3.title: What to write?
step3.description: You can write an association, the first letter, a funny phrase, or a short note.

step4.title: Why?
step4.description: This hint is meant to help you get unstuck and remember this specific flashcard more easily.

step5.title: No cheating
step5.description: Technically you can write the full answer, but then you are only cheating yourself. Please don't :c

step1.title: Hey, it's me
step1.description: I will show you how to start. This will be a short guide on what is what :3

step2.title: What is here?
step2.description: On this screen, you can see the list of courses available in the app.

step3.title: What courses?
step3.description: One course is one tile with the matching name.

step4.title: What do you do here?
step4.description: You choose the courses that interest you and pin them.

step5.title: How to pin?
step5.description: To pin a course, tap the small square on its tile.

step6.title: One more thing
step6.description: At the top, you will find categories.

step7.title: zzzzZZZZzzzz
step7.description: (waiting until you pin the courses you like)

step8.title: Course pinned
step8.description: Great, the course has been pinned! Remember, you can pin more than one.

step9.title: What next?
step9.description: If you have already pinned what interests you, tap the “Next” button at the bottom right.

step1.title: Review screen
step1.description: Hey, I will quickly show you how the review screen works :3

step2.title: Where to tap?
step2.description: You can enter reviews using this button on the bottom bar.

step3.title: Number by the icon
step3.description: If you see a number here, it means there are flashcards waiting for you to review.

step4.title: Courses separately
step4.description: Each tile on this list is a separate course with its own reviews.

step5.title: How many flashcards?
step5.description: The number on the tile shows how many flashcards from that course are currently waiting for review.

step6.title: Now hop in
step6.description: Now tap your first course and jump into the review :3

step1.title: Review screen
step1.description: Hey, you are now on the review screen. Here, flashcards wait for their moment :3

step2.title: Almost like flashcards
step2.description: This screen works similarly to regular flashcards, but the rules here are a little different.

step3.title: Everything is waiting
step3.description: The boxes already contain all the flashcards that are currently waiting for review.

step4.title: No adding
step4.description: That is why the “ADD FLASHCARDS” button does not work here. In this mode, we do not add anything manually.

step5.title: Six boxes
step5.description: Here you always have 6 boxes, not 5 like in the regular game.

step6.title: Biggest difference
step6.description: The biggest difference here is time.

step7.title: Not immediately
step7.description: When you answer a flashcard correctly, it does not move to the next box immediately.

step8.title: You need to wait
step8.description: You need to wait a little. The further you get, the longer the breaks become.

step9.title: Why?
step9.description: This is intentional. To really remember something, you need a chance to recall it after a break. These kinds of reviews strengthen knowledge much better :3

step10.title: You can do it
step10.description: That's everything. You already know the rules, so good luck and see you later :3

peek.listHint: List of flashcards in this box.
peek.emptyBoxDescription: Flashcards will go here when you reach the right learning level.

description.pokazujObramowanie: Show a border around the image on the flashcard.

hint.dostepneTylkoDlaDuzych: Available only for large cards with images.

accessibilityLabel.przelaczWyjasnienieTylkoPoBlednej: Toggle explanation only after incorrect answer

popups.noRows: There are no rows that can be imported yet.
popups.analyzedWithErrors: File checked: {{validRows}} can be imported, {{errorCount}} need fixing.
popups.analyzedWithWarnings: File checked: {{validRows}} can be imported, {{warningCount}} have warnings.
popups.analyzedSuccess: Great! {{validRows}} rows are ready to import.
popups.templateDirectoryMissing: No directory selected for saving the CSV template.
popups.templateDownloadError: Could not download the CSV template.
popups.noCardsToImport: There are no cards that can be imported right now.
popups.confirmPendingImport: Return to file import and import the flashcards or discard the file.

csvGuide.step1: 1. Prepare a CSV or TXT file. If your flashcards contain images, prepare a ZIP file with a CSV file and an images folder.
csvGuide.step2: 2. Choose a file and review the import preview.
csvGuide.imagesDescription: To import images, create a ZIP file containing a CSV file and an images folder with graphics. In the front_image or back_image columns, enter the image path, for example images/dog.png. Supported formats: .png, .jpg, .jpeg, .svg.

selfAssess.title: 1) Self-assessment
selfAssess.summary: The user evaluates: I know or I don't know.

traditional.title: 2) Text answer
traditional.summary: Classic flashcard: question on the front, answer on the back.

backText.note: You can enter multiple answers by separating them with a comma or semicolon.

flip.description: If true, the card will be flipped during learning.

trueFalse.title: 3) True/False
trueFalse.summary: The user marks whether the sentence is true.

mixed.title: 4) Mixed
mixed.summary: Combine different flashcard types in one file.

type.note: Values: traditional, true_false, self_assess (or Polish aliases).

mixed.tip: The column layout remains the same as in the sections above.

manualEditor.removeOrCloseImageForCard: Remove image or close image field for flashcard {{index}}

alerts.resetBoxesDoneMessage: Flashcards currently in boxes have been removed from them and returned to the unknown pool.
alerts.resetBoxesConfirmMessage: Flashcards currently in boxes will be removed from them and returned to the unknown pool. This will not delete reviews or overall course progress.
alerts.resetReviewsDoneMessage: Deleted {{count}} review entries for this course.
alerts.resetReviewsDoneEmpty: There were no saved reviews to delete.
alerts.resetReviewsConfirmMessage: This operation will delete all saved reviews for this course.
alerts.resetAllDoneMessage: Box state and reviews have been cleared. All flashcards returned to the unknown pool.
alerts.resetAllFailed: Could not restore the course from the beginning.
alerts.resetAllConfirmMessage: This operation will clear box state and reviews, and return all flashcards to the unknown pool.
alerts.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this course? This action cannot be undone.

boxes.title: Clear box state
boxes.subtitle: Flashcards currently in boxes are removed from them and returned to the unknown pool.

reviews.title: Delete reviews
reviews.subtitle: Deletes all saved reviews for this course.

all.title: Restore course from the beginning
all.subtitle: Clears box state and reviews, and returns all flashcards to the unknown pool.

appearance.iconDescription: Choose a symbol that you will easily recognize on the course list.
appearance.colorDescription: The color is used as an accent: avatar, button, chips.

customEditor.undoA11y: Undo the last change in flashcards

iconEdit.iconDescription: Choose an icon from the list.
iconEdit.previewHint: Tip: the “final result” is at the top, settings are below.

textChild.przyciskiPodKartaDodawanieNowych: Buttons under the card: adding new flashcards and confirming answers.
textChild.mniejszyPrzyciskDodajFiszkiKtory: Smaller Add flashcards button used in true / false mode
textChild.aktywnePudelkoLosujeFiszkiDo: The active box draws flashcards for the card. Hold your finger on the box to preview its contents.
textChild.mozeszDodacKrotkieSkojarzenieLub: You can add a short association or hint visible with this flashcard during learning.

message.nieUdaloSieOdczytacManifestu: Could not read the backup manifest.

message.wystapilBladPodczasImportuDanych: An error occurred while importing data.

message.wystapilBladPodczasPrzywracaniaDanych: An error occurred while restoring data.

textChild.nicTuNieMaCzas: There is nothing here :( time to choose a course!

textChild.ustawStartNaukiPoSwojemu: Set up the start of learning your way
textChild.teOpcjePokazaSieTylko: These options will be shown only now. Later, you can still change them in course settings.
textChild.samPrzelaczaPudelkaIDobiera: Automatically switches boxes and selects the next flashcards during learning.
textChild.dodajeFiszkiZTegoKursu: Adds flashcards from this course to the general daily review session.
textChild.poOdpowiedziPokazeDodatkoweObjasnienie: After answering, it will show an additional explanation if the flashcard has one.

accessibilityLabel.zapiszOpcjeStartoweIPrzejdz: Save start options and go to flashcards

alert.nieUdaloSieOdnalezcLokalnych: Could not find local data for this course.
alert.usunietoValueZapisanychPowtorekTego: Deleted {{value}} saved reviews for this course.

message.musiszPodacNazweKursuI: You need to enter a course name and choose an icon.
message.musiszPodacNazweKursu: You need to enter a course name.
message.musiszWybracIkone: You need to choose an icon.

message.brakZawartosciKursuUzupelnijFiszki: No course content. Add flashcards first.
message.dodajPrzynajmniejJednaFiszkePrzed: Add at least one flashcard before settings.

accessibilityLabel.wrocDoUstawianiaZawartosciKursu: Go back to setting course content
accessibilityLabel.stworzKursZAktualnaZawartoscia: Create course with current content and settings

textChild.kiedysBedzieTuIchWiecej: There will be more here someday :)

quotes.text: You do not have to be great to start. You have to start to be great.
quotes.author: Zig Ziglar

quotes.text: Do not wait. The time will never be just right.
quotes.author: Napoleon Hill

quotes.text: Amateurs sit and wait for inspiration. The rest just get up and go to work.
quotes.author: Stephen King

quotes.text: Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
quotes.author: Arthur Ashe

quotes.text: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
quotes.author: Mark Twain

quotes.text: Motivation gets you started. Habit keeps you going.
quotes.author: Jim Ryun

quotes.text: Either you run the day, or the day runs you.
quotes.author: Jim Rohn

quotes.text: Action is the foundational key to every success.
quotes.author: Pablo Picasso

quotes.text: Nothing will work unless you do.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.text: Today I will do what others will not, so tomorrow I can do what others cannot.
quotes.author: Jerry Rice

quotes.text: To give anything less than your best is to sacrifice the gift.
quotes.author: Steve Prefontaine

quotes.text: Success is the sum of small efforts, repeated day in and day out.
quotes.author: Robert Collier

quotes.text: I have missed, lost, and failed.. and that is why I win.
quotes.author: Michael Jordan

quotes.text: You do not have to be extreme. You just have to be consistent.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: If you do not do it for yourself, nobody will do it for you.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Your competition is working while you sleep.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Even slow progress is progress. Be proud that you keep showing up.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: One day or day one. You decide.
quotes.author: Paulo Coelho

quotes.text: What you are not changing, you are choosing.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Nobody will do it for you. You are the creator and destroyer of your own destiny.
quotes.author: u/prashantpatel518 (Reddit)

quotes.text: Nothing changes if nothing changes.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Either way, time will pass.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: We have to be our own coaches, because only we are always available.
quotes.author: Steven Pressfield

quotes.text: You miss 100% of the shots you do not take.
quotes.author: Wayne Gretzky

quotes.text: To give anything less than your best is to sacrifice the gift.
quotes.author: Steve Prefontaine

quotes.text: Sometimes it is better to do it well, and sometimes it is better to do it now.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: A year from now, you will wish you had started today.
quotes.author: Karen Lamb

quotes.text: Do you remember how badly you wanted to be where you are now?
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Success is rented, and the rent is due every day.
quotes.author: Rory Vaden

quotes.text: We must all suffer from one of two pains: the pain of discipline or the pain of regret.
quotes.author: Jim Rohn

quotes.text: There are no shortcuts.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Build your own dreams, or someone else will hire you to build theirs.
quotes.author: Farrah Gray

quotes.text: Something imperfect today is better than something perfect tomorrow.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: You cannot plow a field by turning it over in your mind. To begin, begin.
quotes.author: Gordon B. Hinckley

quotes.text: The master has failed more times than the beginner has even tried.
quotes.author: Stephen McCranie

quotes.text: The trouble is, you think you have time.
quotes.author: Anonymous

textChild.nieMaszJeszczePrzypietychKursow: You do not have any courses pinned for reviews yet.
textChild.nieMaszJeszczeWlasnychFiszek: You do not have any custom flashcards yet.
